news.title: SkelPro Updates: Introducing Git Worktree Support for AI Agents!
news.message:
SkelPro now supports Git worktrees, allowing developers to create isolated development environments for AI agents and parallel workflows.

Create dedicated branches for your agents and work on multiple tasks independently without affecting your main project.

Example:
skelpro create agent-1 template.json --worktree --branch agent-feature

More powerful AI development workflows are coming soon!

 -- The SkelPro Team
